root_cause: 100G optical equipment replacement caused 43s connectivity loss between data centers; failover mechanism created inconsistent databases

timeline_events.event: Network maintenance began; 100G optical equipment replaced
Connectivity lost between US East Coast hubs
Automated failover promoted West Coast to primary
Databases found to be inconsistent; failover could not complete

action_items: Improve failover mechanism to handle partial connectivity loss
Add automated consistency verification after failover
